name: XQ2 Heater Cover Screen Pack
summary: XQ2 Heater Cover Screen Pack — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: Expertly crafted from premium stainless steel, the Heater Cover Screen Pack for XQ2 offers durable and efficient replacements for your heating element. Simply place them on top for optimal performance. These screens are exclusively compatible with the XQ2. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
